case_title: RAMIRO DELGADILLO VS. CLEMENT STREET DENTAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $6,000.00 FILED BY DELGADILLO, RAMIRO AS TO DEFENDANT CLEMENT STREET DENTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-31-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF DELGADILLO, RAMIRO

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. THE PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT REACHED AN AGREEMENT PRIOR TO THE CALLING OF THE CASE. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
